creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
Good eye!

I see I've been carrying that forward since Peter first shared it in 2016!

https://people.freebsd.org/~grehan/bhyve_uefi/windows_iso_repack.txt

1. Removing that makes -quiet work. Thank you!
2. Leaving -quiet out still gives a few hundred lines of "fine grained" progress output:

...
 99.42% done, estimate finish Sun Mar 10 13:25:05 2024
 99.64% done, estimate finish Sun Mar 10 13:25:05 2024
 99.87% done, estimate finish Sun Mar 10 13:25:05 2024
...

I'll create an account with schilytools and submit an issue though I still wonder if the FreeBSD shell is missing a hint to not add a newline.

Thanks!
